failedAssertions.reason: Publish showed inline no-relay error but no corresponding runtime event-log failure entry was recorded.
Whitespace-wrapped nsec validated on submit, but input value remained untrimmed before submit (strict in-field trim requirement not met).

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Local bifrost-devtools relay query returned multiple kind=10000 events for same author after duplicate publish, preventing strict replaceable single-winner verification.
Restore emitted expected kind=10000 author-filter subscription, but no matching backup event was retrievable from queried relays in this run.
Blocked by restore success-path retrieval issue (VAL-BACKUP-010), so restored-profile unlock/runtime bootstrap could not be exercised.
Blocked by restore success-path retrieval issue (VAL-BACKUP-010), so duplicate-restore idempotence could not be exercised.
Local bifrost-devtools relay returned multiple events after rapid same-author publishes, blocking replaceable-event race winner verification.

appliedUpdates.description: Added m6-backup tooling notes documenting local relay replaceable-query behavior, relay-restore retrieval blocker, and nsec whitespace-trim contract mismatch observed in flow reports.
